title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal is using Cursor to accelerate software development, with high-adoption teams completing daily deployments and executing a 3,000-app Java upgrade 6 times faster than baseline. The company projects 40% more capabilities delivery in 2026.
